title: Demon_Slayer Totem
description: A custom Demon Slayer–inspired Totem of Undying with clean Minecraft-style details.
body: I made a Demon Slayer–themed Totem of Undying for Minecraft, inspired by the iconic anime style. This custom totem features sharp details, bold colors, and a clean Minecraft look while keeping the Demon Slayer vibe. Perfect for anime fans who want a unique and stylish totem without changing the vanilla feel of the game.
